description_long: This object consists of four rectangular juice cartons arranged side by side, each featuring vibrant fruit illustrations and colorful branding. The front faces display the Cheesy Fruit logo and the names of the flavors: Mango, Manzana (Apple), Mora (Blackberry), and Naranja (Orange), each with a corresponding fruit image. The cartons are predominantly light blue with bold, color-coded sections at the bottom indicating the flavor. The sides of the cartons show nutritional information panels and product details in Spanish. The tops of the cartons are flat and sealed, with no visible straws or openings. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention with bright, appetizing visuals.
description: A set of four colorful juice cartons with fruit illustrations and clear flavor labels, arranged side by side. Each carton features the Cheesy Fruit logo and vibrant images of mango, apple, blackberry, and orange.
description_view_0: The front of the cartons displays the Cheesy Fruit logo and vivid fruit images for Mango, Manzana, Mora, and Naranja, with each flavor clearly labeled.
description_view_1: The left side of the cartons shows nutritional information panels and product details in Spanish, with minimal branding.
description_view_2: The back of the cartons mirrors the front, showing the same fruit images and flavor names but in reverse order: Naranja, Mora, Manzana, Mango.
description_view_3: The right side of the cartons features additional nutritional information and a barcode, with no fruit images or prominent branding.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: mango slices, apples, blackberries, orange slices
